message:
fix(hook): add timeouts and body size limits to daemon communication

- Add 5s connect timeout to query_daemon to prevent hanging on stuck sockets
- Add 30s response timeout and 64KB body limit to query_daemon reader
- Add 2s connect timeout to release_worker with graceful fallback
- Add 5s read timeout to release_worker response

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
